domfsFacts.summary: DOMFS v1 is an experimental context mode, not yet an interactive agent loop.
limits: The current v1 precomputes outline/find/inspect context before the model call; the model is not yet choosing tools step by step.
The fixture exposes data-uid selectors, so high scores can overstate real-page reliability unless we separately test without fixture-only selectors.
This measures whether navigable context helps planning, not whether a production DOMFS API is complete.

recommendations: Keep DOMFS as an experiment behind a context-mode switch until it beats the existing baseline on repeated medium/hard tasks.
Next, make the model call actual tools in a loop: outline, find, inspect, proposeSelector, apply, diff, verify. The current implementation only simulates that trace.
Add a no-fixture-selector run that blocks [data-uid] so we can tell whether the idea transfers to real websites.
Use DOMFS selectively for ambiguous or semantic requests; direct selected-element edits should stay fast and simple.
Use the next run to study the weakest tasks: medium-youtube-hide-title-typo: 91% average, 100% pass rate.

taskAverages.what: Semantic request to hide a warning card without a pasted element.

commonFailureReasons: persistence: browser forbidden node was hidden (1x)
taskAverages.observation: browser target is hidden browser forbidden node was hidden Persistence: browser target is hidden browser forbidden node was hidden Forbidden changed: video-first-card, video-mark-rober-card, video-cooking-card, video-mkbhd-card, video-sponsored-card Broad selectors: article.ytd-rich-item-renderer -> 6

taskAverages.what: Hide sponsored content using an ad synonym instead of the visible badge text.
taskAverages.observation: browser target is hidden browser forbidden nodes remain visible Persistence: browser target is hidden browser forbidden nodes remain visible

observations: Browser low-reasoning baseline averaged 99% across 1 run(s).
This run exercises Perso XXL content scripts, DOM context extraction, validation, and executor in a real browser on fixture pages.

medium-youtube-hide-title-typo averaged 91% with 100% pass rate. browser forbidden node was hidden (1x) persistence: browser forbidden node was hidden (1x) selector article.ytd-rich-item-renderer matched 6 nodes (1x) forbidden node changed: video-first-card (1x)
medium-dashboard-hide-warning averaged 100% with 100% pass rate. generic selectors: article.warning-card, article.warning-card (1x)
medium-docs-remove-recent averaged 100% with 100% pass rate. generic selectors: section.docs-recent-list, section.docs-recent-list (1x)
